posts.author: Lior_Marketplace (Lior Reiner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

Lior again from apps and developers team and I am here to tell you about two apps that can take your customer service, projects, and capacity management to the next level. If you frequently use monday.com for your Service Management needs, have a look at Service Buddy and Teamboard!

But that is not all, I also want to invite the community to join us for a special in-depth demo on Wednesday, September 13th, at 17:00 EMEA/10 AM EDT. During the webinar, you’ll hear from Service Buddy and Teamboard teams on how monday.com users leverage these apps to take their Service Management to the next level.

Plus, stick around for a Q&A session, where you can ask questions about how these apps can help you overcome your challenges.

So why wait? Register now and secure your spot! Don’t miss out on this opportunity to make the most of your monday.com for Service Management.Don’t forget to register using this link

See you there!
Lior
